steps.t: Osbail is by Crannog's ruling-seat in Aughaire, Camran is at the centre island of the settlement, and Tasgall is still hunting hill-beasts north of Au…
Crannog is at his ruling-seat in Aughaire, west of the settlement's central island. You have spoken with some of the Trév Gállorg and should return to…
Crannog is at his ruling-seat in Aughaire, west of the settlement's central island. You have emerged victorious from the Clúcath with the Trév Duvárda…
